task_name: OmniASR Multilingual Speech Recognition Model Deployment

subtask1.query: Read workspace/query.md for task details. You need to configure the omnilingual-asr project, solve the fairseq2 installation problem, implement checkpoint-based loading of the omniASR_CTC_300M.pt model, and build a simple speech recognition demo.
deliverables: load.py - Model loading and test script
